title: How can I recover my account?

history.content: How can I recover my account?

<search>recovering realxmarket account</search>

 documentation:

"Account recovery is only toAccording the possible if you have completed the two-factor authentication (2FA) setup prior to your account being locked or suspended.

If you're unable to access your account, please submit a support ticket with your username and a valid email address associated with your RealXmarket account. Our team will assist you in recovering your account."

Please note that submitting a support ticket is the recommended course of action for account recovery.
